status: Fixed in prompt-scoped next audit advisory lane
finding: `next --prompt` can hard-block retrospective cleanup/audit prompts as `ATM_NEXT_TASK_SCOPE_NOT_FOUND` when the prompt mentions a non-ledger OPT shorthand, even if the requested action is to inspect whether prior cleanup was completed rather than to claim that task.
expectedBehavior: Audit/review prompts that mention non-ledger historical labels should either route to a read-only audit/orient lane or report the missing task as advisory while preserving safe read-only evidence commands. They should not force the agent into a retry loop when no exact task card exists.
evidenceOrRepro: Fixed in `packages/cli/src/commands/next.ts`: read-only audit/analyze prompts with task-like scope misses return `status: task-scope-audit-advisory`, emit `ATM_NEXT_TASK_SCOPE_AUDIT_ADVISORY`, and keep safe read-only guidance instead of hard-blocking. Validation: `node atm.mjs next --prompt "請檢查 OPT-12 後續盤點清單是否已補齊，這不是要 claim OPT-12，只是做 retrospective audit review" --json` with `ATM_PLANNING_REPO_ROOT=C:\Users\User\3KLife\docs\ai_atomic_framework` returned ok with `ATM_NEXT_TASK_SCOPE_AUDIT_ADVISORY`; `npm run validate:prompt-scoped-next` covers the same retrospective OPT-12 lane.
followUp: Keep the retrospective audit regression in `scripts/validate-prompt-scoped-next.ts`; mutation-oriented missing task scopes must still fail closed with `ATM_NEXT_TASK_SCOPE_NOT_FOUND`.
